task_completion.description: The Electrical Engineering Calculations app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the interface of the Electrical Engineering Calculations app.

task_completion.description: The required parameters for power, time, and rate are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values 4200 (or 4.2 for kW), 8 (hours), 30 (days) or 240 (total hours), and 0.14 (rate) are visible in input fields on the screen.

task_completion.description: The total energy consumption is calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calculated energy consumption of approximately 1008 kWh (acceptable range: 1003 to 1013 kWh) is displayed on the screen.
The calculated total cost of approximately $141.12 (acceptable range: $140.12 to $142.12) is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the final calculation is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command, script, or file manager shows that a screenshot was saved to /sdcard/task_result.png, or the final image provided for evaluation is the required screenshot.

integrity.description: The agent used the requested Electrical Engineering Calculations app rather than a generic calculator or web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the UI of the Electrical Engineering Calculations app, not a basic system calculator, browser, or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor or note-taking app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results are displayed in a genuine calculation interface, not as plain text manually typed by the agent.

integrity.description: The results appear to be generated by a calculation function rather than hardcoded.
integrity.visual_evidence: The outputs are shown in result fields corresponding to the inputs, consistent with normal app behavior.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected values: Power = 4200 W (or 4.2 kW), Time = 8 hours/day for 30 days (240 hours total), Rate = $0.14/kWh. Expected total energy = 1008 kWh (tolerance ±5 kWh). Expected total cost = $141.12 (tolerance ±$1.00). The final screenshot must be saved to /sdcard/task_result.png. Note: The specified app (Electrical Engineering Calculations) does not actually have an electricity cost calculator feature. The agent must attempt the calculation using the app as requested; evaluate strictly based on whether the visual evidence shows the requested inputs and outputs within the app interface.
